UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Devil card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Devil card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Devil card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Devil card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Devil card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Devil card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the themes of temptation, seduction, and the struggle between free will and desire as embodied by Mephistopheles Faust.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the negative connotations of bondage or chains. Instead, focus on the allure and power dynamics present in the scene.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Devil card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, brass, dark, suspenseful, building, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Devil card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Devil card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the coercive charisma of the Pied Piper, the hypnotic trance of the children and rats, and the multicolored pipe casting shadows.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the negative connotations of The Devil card. Instead, focus on the theme of seduction and the power of charisma.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Devil card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, dark, suspenseful, ambient, reversed, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Devil card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Devil card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the seductive pull of the Sirens, their hypnotic beauty, and the struggle between temptation and resistance.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the negative connotations associated with The Devil. Instead, focus on the complex dance between freedom and desire.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Devil card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, dark, ominous, suspenseful, instrumental
